title: cyclotrichium depauperatum
intro: Cyclotrichium depauperatum, also known as the scarce leaved cyclotrichium or mountain tea, is a small perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclotrichium depauperatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, with the tea being a popular herbal preparation in Central Asian cultures.
